info.name: Cart API — 50 Test Cases
info.description:
Complete automated test suite for the Shopping Cart API.

BEFORE RUNNING:
1. Reseed DB: uncomment the clear+insert block in check_db.py and run it
2. Start server: uvicorn app.main:app --reload
3. In Postman: open this collection > click Run > Run All

Requests labelled [SETUP] are not test cases — they create state needed by the next test. They must pass for subsequent tests to work.

Variables are saved automatically between requests. Do not change collection variables manually during a run.

item.name: TC-01 — Create cart for valid user
TC-02 — Create cart for different valid user
TC-03 — Duplicate cart (user already has active cart)
TC-09 — user_id overflow (exceeds SQLite max integer)
TC-10 — user_id is a decimal number (float not allowed)

exec: pm.expect(b.details[0].message).to.equal('Must be a valid integer (no decimal allowed)');

item.name: TC-11 — Add new item to cart
TC-12 — Add same variant again (quantity accumulates)
TC-13 — Add different variant to same cart
TC-14 — Add quantity exactly equal to stock (variant 7, stock=5)
TC-15 — Add item to non-existent cart
TC-16 — Add non-existent variant to cart
[SETUP for TC-17] Create cart for user 3
[SETUP for TC-17] Add item to user 3 cart

exec: pm.test('SETUP OK: Status 200, cart is now checked_out', () => {

item.name: TC-17 — Add item to checked-out cart
TC-18 — Quantity exceeds available stock (variant 6, stock=8, request 10)
TC-19a — Add variant 5 qty 7 (sets up accumulated exceed)
TC-19b — Accumulated quantity exceeds stock (7+5=12 > stock 10)
TC-26 — Remove existing item from cart
TC-27 — Remove item from non-existent cart
TC-29 — Remove item that belongs to a different cart

exec: pm.test('Error ITEM_NOT_FOUND (item belongs to cart 1, not cart 2)', () => {

item.name: TC-30 — Remove item from checked-out cart
[SETUP for TC-35] Create cart with items for cascade test
[SETUP for TC-35] Add item to cascade-test cart
TC-35 — Delete cart with items (CASCADE removes items too)

exec: pm.test('Success message (items were cascade-deleted by DB)', () => {
pm.test('Status 200 (deletion allowed regardless of status)', () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));

item.name: TC-41 — Checkout active cart with items
[SETUP for TC-42] Create new cart for user 1 (previous cart just checked out)
TC-42 — Stock reduced after checkout (variant 7 stock=0, add 1 fails)

exec: pm.test('Status 422 (proves stock was deducted on checkout)', () => pm.response.to.have.status(422));
pm.test('Error INSUFFICIENT_STOCK — variant 7 stock is now 0', () => {

item.name: [SETUP for TC-45] Create empty cart for user 2
TC-48 Step 1 — Create cart for user 3
TC-48 Step 2 — Add first item (variant 1, qty 2)
TC-48 Step 3 — Add second item (variant 4, qty 1), save item_id
TC-48 Step 4 — Remove the second item

exec: pm.test('Full lifecycle completed: status is checked_out', () => {

item.name: TC-49 — User can create new cart after checkout

exec: pm.test('Status 201 (user 3 can open new cart after TC-48 checkout)', () => pm.response.to.have.status(201));

item.name: TC-50 — Stock enforcement: variant 7 is out of stock after earlier checkout

exec: pm.test('INSUFFICIENT_STOCK: variant 7 stock=0 after TC-41 deducted all 5 units', () => {
